qa_pairs.question: What is the primary advantage of using a Synchronization client for Alliance Nextcloud, particularly concerning network connectivity?
qa_pairs.answer: The advantage is that you can work on the files offline, i.e., when you do not have network connectivity. They will be synchronized when network connectivity is re-established.

qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of using UNIX command line tools with Alliance Nextcloud, and what are some examples of such tools?
qa_pairs.answer: You can use any available WebDAV command line clients, like curl and cadaver, to copy files between your Unix computer and Nextcloud. Command line tools are useful when you want to copy data between a remote server you log in to and Nextcloud.
